parameters.query: SELECT id, body, conversation_id, contact_id, location_id FROM fact_messages WHERE embedding IS NULL AND message_type IN ('TEXT','WHATSAPP','SMS','EMAIL') AND body IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(body) > 10 ORDER BY sent_at DESC LIMIT 50

nodes.name: Llamar LLM para Intent y Sentiment

parameters.query: UPDATE fact_messages SET embedding = $1::vector, ai_intent = $2, ai_sentiment = $3, ai_is_question = $4 WHERE id = $5

additionalFields.queryParams:
={{ [
  $json.embedding ? JSON.stringify($json.embedding) : null,
  $json.ai_intent        || null,
  $json.ai_sentiment     || null,
  $json.ai_is_question !== undefined ? $json.ai_is_question : null,
  $json.id
] }}

main.node: Llamar LLM para Intent y Sentiment
